mapper.insert:
SELECT 'TSK' || TASK_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TASK ( TASKID, STAGEID, TASKTITLE, TASKDESCRIPTION, TASKSTARTDATE, TASKENDDATE, TASKSTATUS, TASKCREATEDDATE, TASKCREATOR ) VALUES ( #{taskId}, #{stageId}, #{taskTitle}, #{taskDescription, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_DATE(#{taskStartDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_DATE(#{taskEndDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), CASE WHEN TO_DATE(#{taskEndDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') < TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN 4 WHEN TO_DATE(#{taskStartDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') <= TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND TO_DATE(#{taskEndDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN 2 ELSE 1 END, SYSDATE, #{taskCreator, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )

INSERT INTO EMPTASK ( EMPTASKID, EMPID, TASKID, EMPTASKSTARTDATE, EMPTASKENDDATE, EMPTASKSTATUS ) VALUES ( 'ET' || LPAD(EMPTASK_SEQ.NEXTVAL, 9, '0'), #{empId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{taskId}, TO_DATE(#{taskStartDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_DATE(#{taskEndDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), CASE WHEN TO_DATE(#{taskEndDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') < TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN '4' WHEN TO_DATE(#{taskStartDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') <= TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND TO_DATE(#{taskEndDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN '2' ELSE '1' END )
mapper.select: SELECT p.TITLE AS projectName, t.TASKTITLE AS title, TO_CHAR(e.EMPTASKSTARTDATE,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS deadline FROM EMPTASK e JOIN TASK t ON e.TASKID = t.TASKID JOIN STAGE s ON t.STAGEID = s.STAGEID JOIN PROJECT p ON s.PROJECTID = p.PROJECTID WHERE e.EMPID = #{empId} AND e.EMPTASKSTATUS = '1' ORDER BY e.EMPTASKSTARTDATE DESC
SELECT stageId, stgTitle, sequence FROM STAGE WHERE projectId = #{projectId} ORDER BY sequence
mapper.insert:
SELECT 'STG' || LPAD(STAGE_SEQ.NEXTVAL, 8, '0') FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO STAGE (stageId, projectId, stgTitle, sequence, stgStatus, stgProgress, stgCreatedDate) VALUES (#{stageId}, #{projectId}, #{stgTitle}, (SELECT NVL(MAX(sequence), 0) + 1 FROM STAGE WHERE projectId = #{projectId}), '1', 0, SYSDATE)
mapper.select:
SELECT NVL(COUNT(*), 0) FROM TASK t LEFT JOIN STAGE s ON t.stageId = s.stageId WHERE s.projectId = #{projectId}
AND
mapper.insert:
SELECT 'TDL' || LPAD(TASKDAILY_SEQ.NEXTVAL, 12, '0') FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TASKDAILYLOG (logId, empTaskId, logDate, logStatus, logReason) VALUES(#{logId}, #{empTaskId}, TO_DATE(#{logDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{logStatus}, #{logReason, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select: SELECT TO_CHAR(logDate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS logDate, logStatus, logReason FROM TASKDAILYLOG WHERE empTaskId = #{empTaskId} ORDER BY logDate ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE task SET taskStatus = ( SELECT CASE WHEN latestStatus = 'S' THEN '6' WHEN completedDays >= totalDays THEN '4' WHEN completedDays > 0 THEN '2' ELSE taskStatus END FROM ( SELECT (SELECT dl.logStatus FROM TASKDAILYLOG dl JOIN EMPTASK et ON dl.empTaskId = et.empTaskId WHERE et.taskId = #{taskId} ORDER BY dl.logDate DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY) AS latestStatus, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TASKDAILYLOG dl JOIN EMPTASK et ON dl.empTaskId = et.empTaskId WHERE et.taskId = #{taskId} AND dl.logStatus = 'F') AS completedDays, (SELECT taskEndDate - taskStartDate + 1 FROM task WHERE taskId = #{taskId}) AS totalDays FROM DUAL ) ) WHERE taskId = #{taskId}
UPDATE task SET taskStatus = '5' WHERE TRUNC(SYSDATE) > taskEndDate AND taskStatus NOT IN ('4', '6')
mapper.select:
SELECT p.PROJECTID, p.TITLE, p.PROJECTTYPE, CASE WHEN COUNT(e.NAME) > 1 THEN MIN(e.NAME) || ' 외 ' || (COUNT(e.NAME) - 1) || '명' ELSE MIN(e.NAME) END AS managerName, TO_CHAR(p.STARTDATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS startDate, TO_CHAR(p.ENDDATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS endDate, TRUNC(p.ENDDATE - p.STARTDATE) AS totalDays, CASE WHEN p.STARTDATE > TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN '시작 전' WHEN p.ENDDATE < TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN '0' ELSE TO_CHAR(GREATEST(TRUNC(p.ENDDATE - SYSDATE), 0)) || ' / ' || TO_CHAR(TRUNC(p.ENDDATE - p.STARTDATE)) END AS remainDays, p.PROGRESS, CASE WHEN p.ENDDATE < TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN '4' WHEN p.STARTDATE <= TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND p.ENDDATE >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN '2' ELSE p.STATUS END AS status FROM PROJECT p JOIN EMPPROJECT ep ON p.PROJECTID = ep.PROJECTID JOIN EMPLOYEE2 e ON ep.EMPID = e.EMPID WHERE p.PROJECTID IN ( SELECT projectId FROM EMPPROJECT WHERE empId = #{empId} ) AND ep.ROLE = 'M'
AND
GROUP BY p.PROJECTID, p.TITLE, p.PROJECTTYPE, p.STARTDATE, p.ENDDATE, p.PROGRESS, p.STATUS ORDER BY p.PROJECTID DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH FIRST #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT NVL(COUNT(*), 0) FROM PROJECT p JOIN EMPPROJECT ep ON p.PROJECTID = ep.PROJECTID JOIN EMPLOYEE2 e ON ep.EMPID = e.EMPID WHERE p.PROJECTID IN ( SELECT projectId FROM EMPPROJECT WHERE empId = #{empId} ) AND ep.ROLE = 'M'
AND
mapper.update: UPDATE task SET taskStatus = '6' WHERE taskId IN ( SELECT t.taskId FROM task t JOIN stage s ON t.stageId = s.stageId WHERE s.projectId = #{projectId} AND t.taskStatus NOT IN ('4') )
mapper.select: SELECT EMPTASKID FROM EMPTASK WHERE TASKID = #{taskId}
